title: Alloy Board Manifest v1
description: Declarative description of a board supported by the alloy embedded C++ framework.

board_id.description: Unique machine-readable board identifier. Must match the boards/ subdirectory name.

display_name.description: Human-readable board name shown in CLI output (e.g. 'Nucleo-G071RB').

family.description: MCU family identifier matching the alloy-devices package family name (e.g. 'stm32g0').

device.description: Specific device identifier used to locate generated headers in alloy-devices (e.g. 'stm32g071rb').

arch.description: CPU architecture used to select the compiler toolchain and startup code.

linker_script.description: Linker script filename, relative to the board directory (e.g. 'STM32G071RBT6.ld').

board_header.description: Path to board.hpp, relative to the repo root (e.g. 'boards/nucleo_g071rb/board.hpp').

tier.description: Board support tier: 1 = primary (CI validated), 2 = secondary, 3 = community/experimental.

debug.description: Debug probe and flash tool configuration.

openocd_cfg.description: Space-separated list of OpenOCD -f arguments (interface + target config files).

stm32_programmer.description: True if STM32CubeProgrammer is supported as an alternative flash tool.

esptool_app_offset.description: Flash offset for the application binary (hex string, e.g. '0x10000').

esptool_partition_table.description: Path to partition CSV, relative to repo root.

serial_globs.description: Glob patterns for the debug serial port device (used by alloyctl monitor).

active_high.description: True if LED is lit when pin is high (common-cathode).

active_low.description: True if LED is lit when pin is low (common-anode).

clock_profiles.description: Named clock profiles available for this board (from clock_config.hpp).

firmware_targets.description: CMake target names that can be built and flashed for this board.

bundle_target.description: CMake target that builds all firmware_targets in one shot.

build_dir_suffix.description: Path suffix appended to the repo build/ directory for this board (e.g. 'hw/g071').

primary_size_bytes.description: Primary (= secondary) slot size in bytes.

secondary_on_ext_flash.description: True if secondary slot is on external SPI/QSPI flash.

notes.description: Free-form notes about the board (connectors, errata, special setup).
